other_observers: Seen with Van Truan, and many other birders, including the finder Mark Peterson, also present Bill Maynard, Glenn Walbek, John Drummond, and a lot more.
duration: Off and on for a hour or more
description: Mark Peterson found this loon.  The gray on the back of head, a long bill, that was some what upturned, though not as much as Red-throated Loon.  The white flank patch on each side was very obvious.  The throat was dark.  The head seemed more blocky and not round. See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
